title: penstemon subulatus
intro: Penstemon subulatus, also known as Cliff Penstemon, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and relieving congestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Cliff Penstemon can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal benefits, and its flowers can also be used as a natural dye.
